subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in literature.
eligibleContentText: Ask and answer questions to demonstrate understanding of a text, referring explicitly to the text as the basis for the answers.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in literature.
eligibleContentText: Recount poems, dramas, or stories, including fables, folktales, and myths from diverse cultures; determine the central message, lesson, or moral and explain how it is conveyed through key details in the text.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in literature.
eligibleContentText: Describe characters in a story (e.g., their traits, motivations, feelings) and explain how their actions contribute to the sequence of events.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in literature.
eligibleContentText: Explain the point of view from which a story is narrated, including the difference between first- and third-person narrations.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of connections within, between, and/or among texts.
eligibleContentText: Compare and contrast the themes, settings, and plots of stories written by the same author about the same or similar characters (e.g., in books from a series).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in literature.
eligibleContentText: Determine or clarify the meaning of unknown and multiple-meaning words and phrases based on grade 3 reading and content, choosing flexibly from a range of strategies (context clues, affixes, root words).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in literature.
eligibleContentText: Demonstrate understanding of word relationships and nuances in word meanings (literal vs. nonliteral meaning; shades of meaning among related words).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Answer questions to demonstrate understanding of a text, referring explicitly to the text as the basis for the answers.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Determine the main idea of a text; recount the key details and explain how they support the main idea.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of key ideas and details in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Describe the relationship between a series of historical events, scientific ideas or concepts, or steps in technical procedures in a text, using language that pertains to time, sequence, and cause/effect.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Explain the point of view from which a text is written.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of craft and structure in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Use text features (e.g., headings, graphics, charts) and search tools (e.g., key words, sidebars, hyperlinks) to efficiently locate information relevant to a given topic.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of connections within, between, and/or among informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Describe the logical connection between particular sentences and paragraphs to support specific points in a text (e.g., comparison, cause/effect, first/second/third in a sequence).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of connections within, between, and/or among informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Compare and contrast the most important points and key details presented in two texts on the same topic.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of connections within, between, and/or among informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Use information gained from illustrations, maps, photographs, and the words in a text to demonstrate understanding of the text (e.g., where, when, why, and how key events occur).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Determine or clarify the meaning of unknown and multiple-meaning words and phrases based on grade 3 reading and content, choosing flexibly from a range of strategies (context clues, affixes, academic/domain words, root words).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Demonstrate understanding of word relationships and nuances in word meanings (literal vs. nonliteral meaning; shades of meaning among related words).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Explain the function of nouns, pronouns, verbs, adjectives, and adverbs in general and their functions in particular sentences.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Form and use regular and irregular plural nouns.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Use abstract nouns (e.g., childhood).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Form and use regular and irregular verbs.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Form and use the simple verb tenses (e.g., I walked; I walk; I will walk).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Ensure subject-verb and pronoun-antecedent agreement.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Form and use comparative and superlative adjectives and adverbs, and choose between them depending on what is to be modified.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Use coordinating and subordinating conjunctions.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Produce simple, compound, and complex sentences.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Capitalize appropriate words in titles.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Use commas in addresses.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Use commas and quotation marks in dialogue.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Form and use possessives.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Use conventional spelling for high-frequency and other studied words and for adding suffixes to base words (e.g., sitting, smiled, cries, happiness).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Use spelling patterns and generalizations (e.g., word families, position-based spellings, syllable patterns, ending rules, meaningful word parts) in writing words.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Use knowledge of language and its conventions.
eligibleContentText: Choose words and phrases for effect.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 3 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content
